item.title: 希腊正计划禁止15岁以下儿童使用社交媒体
item.description: 希腊总理基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯表示，希腊即将提出一项针对15岁以下人群的社交媒体禁令。【原文：Greece will soon propose a social media ban for anyone under 15 years old, Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis said.】

item.title: 前Datadog高管创立的AI初创公司获得首轮4900万美元融资
item.description:
这笔交易是Iconiq有史以来首次开展的初创企业孵化项目。 【原文：

The deal is Iconiq’s first-ever startup incubation. 

】

item.title: 随着伊朗战争持续和货物积压，特朗普确保霍尔木兹海峡畅通的努力陷入困境
item.description: 目前，约有1,000个装有新鲜农产品的冷藏集装箱滞留在贾瓦哈拉尔·尼赫鲁港务局。【原文：Around 1,000 reefer containers of fresh produce are currently held up at Jawaharlal Nehru Port Authority.】

item.title: 美国盘前领涨股：Coherent、Delta、Nvidia、Semtech、Uber
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点50分，标普500指数期货下跌0.1%，因中东能源基础设施遭袭推动油价再度上涨。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures are down 0.1% as of 7:50 a.m. in New York as attacks on energy infrastructure in the Middle East drove a renewed advance in oil prices.】

item.title: 伊朗袭击关键能源基础设施，美股期货下跌
item.description: 周二，随着伊朗局势持续升级，油价走高，并在美联储为期两天的政策会议召开前加剧了通胀担忧，美国股市期货应声下跌。【原文：US stock futures fell Tuesday after tensions in the Iran war continued to escalate, driving oil prices higher and stoking inflation concerns ahead of the Federal Reserve’s two-day policy meeting.】

item.title: 可再生能源缓冲了伊朗冲击对欧洲电价的影响
item.description: The region’s electricity market is proving far more resilient to fossil-fuel supply disruptions than in 2022.

item.title: 杰富瑞和花旗指出飙升的能源股可能已见顶
item.description: 在伊朗战争期间将资金投向能源股的投资者，切勿掉以轻心。【原文：Investors who are hiding out in energy stocks amid the war in Iran shouldn’t get too comfortable.】

item.title: ARK投资公司创始人凯茜·伍德表示，人工智能已开始提升生产力
item.description: 据ARK投资管理公司（ARK Investment Management LLC）的凯茜·伍德（Cathie Wood）称，人工智能已经提升了劳动生产率，并在未来十年有望带来更显著的增长。【原文：Artificial intelligence is already raising labor productivity and is set to unlock more significant gains in the coming decade, according to Cathie Wood of ARK Investment Management LLC.】

item.title: Nebius计划在与Meta达成交易后筹集37.5亿美元债务融资
item.description: 人工智能数据中心开发商Nebius Group NV表示，在与Meta Platforms Inc.达成商业合作协议后，该公司计划通过可转换债券筹集约37.5亿美元。【原文：Artificial intelligence data center developer Nebius Group NV said it intends to raise about $3.75 billion in convertible debt on the heels of a commercial deal with Meta Platforms Inc.】

item.title: 裕信银行提前向罗马方面通报了德国商业银行350亿欧元的收购要约
item.description: 据知情人士透露，在提出一项价值350亿欧元（400亿美元）的收购要约以扩大对德国商业银行（Commerzbank AG）的影响力之前，裕信银行（UniCredit SpA）的代表已向意大利总理乔尔吉娅·梅洛尼的办公室进行了情况通报。【原文：UniCredit SpA representatives briefed Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni’s office in advance of a €35 billion ($40 billion) bid to deepen its influence over Commerzbank AG, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 刚果限制措施引发的钴短缺预计将持续至2030年
item.description: 据大通商品公司称，由于最大产国刚果民主共和国实施的出口限制影响了供应链，全球钴短缺预计将持续到本十年末。【原文：A global cobalt shortage is expected to persist through the end of this decade as export restrictions from top producer Democratic Republic of Congo impact the supply chain, according to trading house Darton Commodities.】

item.title: 阿里巴巴人工智能瞄准“沉默的肝病流行病”
item.description: 该公司的模型通过评估医疗筛查结果，以识别需要早期诊断的人群【原文：Company’s model assesses medical screenings to find those in need of early diagnosis】

item.title: 特朗普团队借鉴“管理贸易”策略，针对中国提出新构想
item.description: 全球两大经济体正在考虑建立一种新的机制来监管双方的商业往来。【原文：The world’s two biggest economies are considering a new mechanism to oversee their commercial ties.】

item.title: Onex首席执行官勒布朗效仿巴菲特，大举押注保险业
item.description: Onex Corp. 豪赌了一家保险初创公司，没过多久，亏损便开始不断累积。【原文：Onex Corp. made a big bet on an insurance startup, and it didn’t take long for the losses to mount.】

item.title: Arauco 通过建设全球最大浆厂摆脱了垃圾级评级
item.description: 据这家智利公司的首席财务官称，尽管行业正面临低迷，但Celulosa Arauco y Constitucion SA公司押注建设全球最大浆厂的决策即将获得回报。【原文：Celulosa Arauco y Constitucion SA’s gamble on building the world’s largest pulp mill in the face of an industry downturn is set to pay off, according to the Chilean company’s chief financial officer.】

item.title: 特朗普在查戈斯群岛问题上的反复无常促使毛里求斯削减开支
item.description: 毛里求斯正在控制开支，以缓解英国宣布在未获得美国支持的情况下不会执行将查戈斯群岛移交给毛里求斯的条约所带来的财政影响。【原文：Mauritius is controlling spending to offset the fiscal impact of the UK announcing it won’t implement a treaty handing the Chagos Islands to Mauritius without the support of the US.】

item.title: 受伊朗局势影响，英国汽油价格飙升至18个月来最高点
item.description: 受中东冲突影响，英国燃油价格连续第二周大幅上涨，目前已达到18个月以来的最高水平。【原文：Fuel prices for UK drivers hit their highest level in over 18 months after a second week of sharply rising costs in response to the conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 尽管美国股市表现坚挺，全球股市仍在下跌
item.description: MSCI全球股票指数正面临自2022年以来最大跌幅。【原文：An MSCI index of global stocks heads for biggest drop since 2022.】

item.title: 数据中心开发商T5计划为新项目筹集20亿美元股权资金
item.description: T5数据中心计划筹集20亿美元股权资金以建设更多设施，这再次表明，大量资本正涌入人工智能基础设施的建设领域。【原文：T5 Data Centers plans to raise $2 billion in equity to roll out more of the facilities, the latest sign of the vast amounts of capital pouring into the construction of artificial intelligence infrastructure.】

item.title: 在新商业时代，争夺银行AI代理的竞争日趋白热化
item.description: 多年来，稳定币行业一直在等待其“杀手级应用”——即能够证明数字美元不仅是加密货币投机者的工具，还能在全球范围内推动日常商业活动的应用场景。【原文：For years, the stablecoin industry has been waiting for its killer app — the use case that would prove digital dollars are more than a tool for crypto speculators, by powering everyday commerce at global scale.】

item.title: 伊朗战争威胁经济复苏，德国投资者信心下滑
item.description: 随着伊朗局势的动荡，市场对欧洲最大经济体即将迎来强劲复苏的期待有所降温，德国投资者的乐观情绪因此大幅恶化，程度远超预期。【原文：German investor optimism worsened far more than expected as the war in Iran tempers hopes that Europe’s largest economy is on the cusp of a strong revival.】

item.title: 交易员争相购入对冲工具，以防范战争风险引发的剧烈汇率波动
item.description: 外汇交易员正大量买入对冲工具以防范剧烈波动，同时密切关注中东局势的后续发展。【原文：Currency traders are loading up on protection against extreme moves as they brace for what comes next in the Middle East.】

item.title: 南非债券资金外流激增，伊朗冲突削弱其吸引力
item.description: 伊朗战争引发了南非债券市场至少六年来最大规模的资金外流，因为外国投资者对近几个月来最受欢迎的新兴市场投资标的之一失去了兴趣。【原文：The Iran war sparked the biggest outflow in at least six years from South Africa’s bond market as foreign investors lost their appetite for one of the most popular emerging-market trades of recent months.】

item.title: 氨纶生产商莱卡在经历多年经营困境后申请破产
item.description: 氨纶生产商莱卡公司已在得克萨斯州申请第11章破产保护，以实施一项重组协议。根据该协议，在债权人接管公司业务后，其大部分债务将被注销。【原文：Spandex maker The Lycra Company has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in Texas to implement a restructuring deal that will see most of its debt written off after creditors took control of the business.】

item.title: 奥迪预计新款SUV车型和成本节约措施将推动2026年利润增长
item.description: 由奥迪领衔的大众汽车集团旗下高端品牌群，得益于Q9 SUV等新车型以及运营效率的提升，今年盈利能力有所提升，这有助于抵消关税影响及中国市场的竞争压力。【原文：Volkswagen AG’s upmarket brand group led by Audi sees rising profitability this year on new models like the Q9 SUV and efficiencies to help offset tariffs and competition in China.】

item.title: 摩根大通租下办公空间后计划在波士顿大规模招聘
item.description: 摩根大通公司已同意成为波士顿最新摩天大楼的主租户，计划在该市新增数百个工作岗位。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. plans to add hundreds of jobs in Boston after agreeing to become the anchor tenant in the city’s newest skyscraper.】

item.title: 美银称，随着投资者转为看跌，股市狂热情绪逐渐消退
item.description: 根据美国银行最新发布的基金经理调查报告，随着全球投资者转为看跌，过去几个月来“泡沫般”的牛市情绪正在消退。【原文：The “frothy bull” market sentiment of the past few months is ending as global investors turn bearish, according to Bank of America Corp.’s latest fund manager survey.】

item.title: 刚果批准美国公司收购钴矿企业的交易，矿产协议取得进展
item.description: 刚果民主共和国表示，已批准美国公司Virtus Minerals Inc.收购铜钴矿商Chemaf SA，此项交易将有助于加强美国与该非洲国家之间的伙伴关系。【原文：The Democratic Republic of Congo indicated it’s approving American firm Virtus Minerals Inc.’s purchase of copper and cobalt miner Chemaf SA, a deal that will help bolster a partnership between the US and the African nation.】

item.title: 土耳其财政部长西姆塞克表示，伊朗战争引发的石油冲击威胁到通胀控制计划
item.description: 土耳其财政部长梅赫梅特·西姆塞克表示，伊朗战争引发的油价冲击可能暂时打乱政府的抗通胀计划。【原文：Turkish Finance Minister Mehmet Simsek said an oil-price shock triggered by the war in Iran risks temporarily derailing the government’s disinflation program.】

item.title: 百度携手OpenClaw智能音箱，推动代理式AI范式发展
item.description: 百度公司正押注于OpenClaw的爆红，以弥补其核心业务的下滑。其最新举措是推出智能音箱，将其作为这款爆红AI助手的语音控制遥控器。【原文：Baidu Inc. is betting on the breakout success of OpenClaw to offset a decline in its core business. Its latest push: smart speakers serving as a voice-controlled remote for the viral AI agent.】
